response.original_title: Nómadas sobre ruedas: 100 días en Mongolia
response.overview: A five-month journey will allow viewers to discover, through the eyes of the adventure's protagonists, the social and anthropological reality of this remote, and for many, unknown country: its political and religious context, the harsh reality faced by children in the capital and the NGOs working there to alleviate this problem; the simple, nature-driven life of the nomadic population, and the ancestral customs and traditions of the Kazakh people. All this and much more unfolds in a captivating journey filled with emotion, adventure, and humor.
response.title: Nómadas sobre ruedas: 100 días en Mongolia
